text: Redshift Architecture @ tisstiesncanitia - © stranam e Petabyte-scale Data warehouse * OLAP (Column based) not OLTP (row/transaction) * Pay as you use ... similar structure to RDS e Direct Query S3 using Redshift Spectrum e Direct Query other DBs using federated query e Integrates with AWS tooling such as Quicksight * SQL-like interface JDBC/ODBC connections
